specific_question: What type of training has the MediConn Solutions IT department provided to employees on the features of the CRM system, and how could this training help the company protect client privacy through 2026?
answer: The IT department of MediConn Solutions offered training sessions to its employees on the cybersecurity features of the CRM system in November 2025. This feature is structured to protect the privacy of MediConn Solution's clientele into 2026.
dr_question: According to an article in WTT Solutions in March 2025, Customer Relations Management (CRM) is an important component of any healthcare business plan. What would a business development representative look for in CRM software that would contribute to MediConn Solutions' business growth in 2026?
